violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - Insides of large equipment (Refrigerators, microwave, prep-tables, counters, ext.) in need of thorough and more frequent cleanings.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - Door panels and sides of large equipment (Refrigerators, microwave, prep-tables, counters, ext.) in need of thorough and more frequent cleanings.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors in kitchen, behind equipment/shelves, and along edges of walls in need of more frequent/thorough cleanings.
